sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, a Boolean, b Boolean) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, a, b) VALUES (1, true, false), (2, false, true), (3, true, true);
UPDATE test_table SET a = false WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, a AND b AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE a AND b = true;
